content: This Brain Twin summary uses the NeuroTwin system to create a digital twin representation of the patient's brain. For clinical decision support only. Not a substitute for professional judgment. Confidence level is moderate.

sections.body: Subject hash: a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d2e3f4a5b6c7d8e9f0a1b2. De-identified identifier for longitudinal tracking.
Baseline neurophysiological metrics: Peak alpha 9.8 Hz. Frontal theta/beta ratio 3.2 (elevated). Global alpha power 12.3 uV2.

The NeuroTwin analysis reveals elevated frontal theta and reduced alpha coherence. This digital twin model predicts treatment response based on the patient's unique neural signature. The system uses advanced algorithms to create a comprehensive brain model.
Confidence tier: moderate. Based on adequate data quality and three supporting citations.
For clinical decision support only. Not a substitute for professional judgment.
Data from 19-channel qEEG recording. Analysis via automated pipeline v2.1.0.
